case_title: HEIDI H. LAO VS. MARGARET LAO (JUNG) et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST HEIDI H. LAO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANTS BY THE JAN-15-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
